I'm a bot, delete this. About Us Who we are Home > About Us Our Values Honesty We believe it’s better to be honest than to delude others, because then you are probably deluding yourself, too. We believe in doing the right thing and to not cut corners to drive profits. Respect Apollo Marketing is a proud Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business. We strongly encourage mutual respect to reduce workplace stress and to build strong workplace relationships among both colleagues and clients. Transparency We believe in business transparency so all of our clients know where we are in the work performed, and we make it easy for our clients to monitor results from our efforts. Community Our sense of community stems from a coaching, volunteering, and a giving back philosophy. We take pride in where we live and believe that when we cooperatively face challenges together, we can make a local impact. Our Philosophy But first, a little background into the owners purpose… To start, my beautiful wife loves the sun! Like really really really loves it! Her happy place is sitting in a chair on a beach at the edge of the water line with her toes in the water and the sun warming her soul. My kids are part Greek, and my son has always been a Greek God aficionado. He may not openly admit it, but even as an adult he’s still a Percy Jackson fan. I get it though as I too enjoy the series! On my side of the family, I was around 16 when my Mom started her own business. Looking back, I can still remember how proud she was when the doors opened. Nine years later, I also remember the sad day when she closed the doors, and thinking I wish I could have helped. Back to our philosophy… As a seasoned service industry program manager, I wanted to start a service business that centered around helping other businesses grow via marketing and sales. Our name and philosophy came about when I looked at my purpose, my family, and it hit me like a bowling ball. The two Greek Gods, Apollo and Helios are often identified as the same being – or Apollo. Among other things Apollo was worshiped as the sun-god, and it was believed that he and his horse driven chariot guided the sun across the sky each day. For our business, the name Apollo epitomizes both family and guidance. Apollo Marketing’s philosophy is to bring family and community to business, and whose goals are to help guide businesses towards accomplishing their marketing objectives. By doing this, we build strong partnerships to help your small to medium sized business flourish and succeed. Have Something Awesome In Mind? —Please choose an option— I am not trying to sell you something. I am trying to sell you something and I'm wasting my time. Careers Home > Careers Social Media Specialist We are looking for a Social Media Specialist to be tasked with creating original content for both paid and organic distribution on social media channels for Apollo Marketing and our social media properties. Much of the content will require graphic design capabilities so applicants should have experience in graphic design. This role combines the creative side of writing and producing social media content with the analytical side of developing strong strategy and finding insights from analysis of posts. Our social media properties require high-quality and engaging content, so your skills must extend far beyond the ability to just make a simple post. We are looking for an applicant that is creative, artistic, and intuitive with graphic design tools and social media properties. You must be willing to learn about various the nuances of social media and how to build a healthy social media presence. Job Responsibilities Create content for social posts with high standards for originality, creativity, engagement, and overall quality Create unique and creative graphics for social media posts and other online promotions Manage online social media reputations Schedule and maintain a monthly social media schedule Independently write, edit, and proof all social media copy for accuracy, clarity, and grammar Manage and maintain online reputations and communities, including monitoring and responding accordingly to negative reviews and comments Stay well-versed and knowledgeable about social media best practices and trends Manage social media access and requests for current client base Establish voice and tone for wide range of clients Able to work flexibly and respond to urgent client situations after hours if needed Applicant Requirements 1-2+ years of social media management experience Graphic Design experience with Adobe Indesign, Adobe Illustrator, or similar programs Excellent writing skills and a high attention to detail Ability to jump from the creative side of marketing to the analytical side and Ability to use data to back up idea Ability to work under deadlines for multiple clients at once Email Resume Brand Ambassador We are looking for an enthusiastic, motivated, and self-driven Brand Ambassador that can be a face for our company to promote our services while also building relationships that could one day flourish in to leads and partnerships. If you have the aptitude to effectively communicate with customers both online and offline, we would like to meet you. To be a successful Brand Ambassador, you will need to attend trade shows and networking groups around the local Frederick area to showcase our company. You should also be an excellent social media user, with the ability to advertise our products and answer client queries online. Ultimately, you should be able to increase our company’s brand awareness and generate new sales opportunities. Relationships come first though, and we are looking for someone who is highly motivated and ready to go out and build those bridges. Responsibilities Participate in networking groups and trade shows as a spokesperson for our company Network and build trusting relationships with potential customers Schedule sales and follow up meetings with potential customers Thoroughly understand our products and services to inform potential customers Use word-of-mouth marketing techniques, like referring our company to friends Assist in organizing marketing events Track customers’ preferences and suggest advertising and positioning ideas Provide feedback to the Marketing and Product departments regarding customers’ requests Track and report on competitors’ marketing activities Posting about our products/services online (e.g. social media and forums) Requirements Excellent communication skills Professional attitude An outgoing, friendly personality, and a desire to meet new people Experience creating online content Experience in sales is a plus A self starter who can work with little supervision Preferred Familiarity with scheduling tools for social media, like Hootsuite, Facebook Business, and Buffer BS in Marketing or relevant degree Email Resume Outside Sales Associate (Part Time & Full Time) How would you like to provide solutions to small business owners to help dominate their competition? At Apollo Marketing we offer you just that. If you’re a proven sales professional looking to accelerate your career at a high-growth company, then this is the position for you. We are building a high-caliber sales-force to offer our best-in-class lead generation, social media, website design, and search engine marketing products to small business owners from coast to coast. If you enjoy working with a seasoned professional team, have a will to win, and a desire to learn and make great money for your hard work, this is the job for you. We’re currently seeking a competitive and self-motivated individual to increase sales and drive revenue. As an Outside Sales Representative, you will have the opportunity to meet with small to medium sized businesses and provide custom solutions that help them achieve their growth goals. As deals close, you will instantly get paid. As clients sign up for monthly service, you will also get a monthly residual. We have the technical and service teams… We just need you. Education and/or Experience: Bachelor’s Degree or four years related experience or equivalent combination of education and experience Knowledge of Digital Marketing industry helpful Sales experience helpful Duties and Responsibilities: Builds and maintains strong working relationships with current and perspective clients Proactively build sales and develop new business while maintaining a strong margin Source and present creative ideas that meet the needs of our clients Utilize our digital proposal system to close and modify contracts Continuous improvement of industry knowledge through digital training, trade shows, and networking Attend sales meetings as scheduled Communicates with various internal departments regarding upcoming offers/projects Offers suggestions for improvement Required to perform other duties as requested or assigned Benefits: Highly Competitive Compensation 1099 Employee Job Knowledge, Skills and Abilities: Must possess excellent verbal and written communication skills Able to manage multiple tasks and priorities and adapt to changing situations Must have knowledge of basic computer software applications and have professional typing skills. Must have a high level of interpersonal skills to handle sensitive and confidential situations. Requires excellent organizational skills. Must have strong attention to detail. Able to follow through timely on tasks and projects. Email Resume WordPress and CSS Developer We’re currently accepting resumes for WordPress Developers for small to medium sized websites. These applicants should be able to expertly build and optimize WordPress websites. This opportunity is best suited for people who enjoy fast paced environments with little management oversight. This candidate must have excellent attention to detail, interest in new concepts and technology, and be very organized with their work and processes. Services Industries Work About Who We Are The Team Good Stuff The Blog The M Word Podcast Let’s Talk! Who We Are We’re On A Mission. Yours. Arlington Strategy provides our clients a comprehensive suite of marketing and communications services – building brands that connect people, elevate causes, promote ideas and opportunities, and make a difference. Follow us on Instagram , Facebook , and LinkedIn to learn more about our work, and subscribe to our email #newsletter for marketing tips and local news delivered monthly. We believe in certain things at our core. These values aren’t simply sayings we post on our wall. They are the north star for the team we hire, the clients we partner with, and the way we work. Collaboration: Creativity thrives when we work together, with our team, and with our clients. We believe that anyone can contribute a game-changing idea and that the best thinking is borne of a diversity of experience and perspective. We find satisfaction in the contributions we make, not the credit we receive. We immerse ourselves in our clients’ challenges, and our success is measured by their success. Community: The work we do for the clients we partner with and the people they serve are all part of an ecosystem—one where the things we say, the words we write, the messages we convey, the artwork we design, the strategies we develop, and the causes we serve ultimately have an impact on someone, somewhere. Whether bound by geography or a like-minded spirit, we thrive on the energy of interconnectedness, and the belief that at the end of the day, what we do—and for whom—makes a difference. Integrity: Honesty, sincerity, humility, dedication to our clients’ needs: these are our jumping-off points—the principles upon which we start every engagement. We offer our creativity and passion in service to our clients’ missions, and that means best positioning them to achieve it. We’re constantly pushing our clients to innovate, helping them grow their reach, impact, and yes, their marketing savvy and skills – even if that means working ourselves out of a role. Action: We have the privilege of a platform, and we use it unapologetically in pursuit of a better world. To be complacent is to be complicit: We don’t have the luxury to stay silent when we should speak up; we don’t have the right to sit out when we need to jump in. We have an obligation to say more, to do more, to be more—in the name of social justice, gun safety, women’s rights, racial equity, and economic freedom. We advocate for the things we believe in by walking the walk and working for organizations that do the same. Respect: Decency drives our attitudes and actions—toward our partners, our clients, our community, and each other. Our team listens. Our team supports, commiserates, empathizes. Our team doesn’t just talk: we embrace conversation; we celebrate discussion. Our team pushes back when needed, in a constructive way. We love our work, but we know life is short. We approach what we do with an appreciation for priorities, a healthy dose of perspective, and an abiding belief in the golden rule. Our approach is simple. Do good work. Be good people. Bring about good change. We ask not what you want to do but what you want to achieve. We challenge our clients to examine their assumptions and explore outside their comfort zone. We’ll make recommendations for switching things up or taking a risk when we feel your goals could be better served by doing so. The conventional wisdom is that business isn’t personal, but we believe it is. Our team becomes an extension of your team, and our client relationships are best defined as partnerships. We immerse ourselves in your challenges, and our success is measured by your success.. We are more than deliverable-producing external consultants. We’re in the business of growing our clients’ brands so they can scale their impact–so we don’t settle for checking the boxes of a particular scope. Instead, we approach specific challenges with an appreciation for context, and an eye on the big picture – helping our clients make marketing decisions and investments in the name of who they are, what they do, and why they do it.. Our work is never just a job. We don’t exist to sell work. We exist to build brands that do good. We do what it takes to help our clients thrive – so they can make the world a better place to live, learn, work, and play. " And at the end of the day? We do what it takes to help our clients thrive – so they can make the world a better place to live, learn, work, and play. Let’s talk about your challenges. These answers might help. What are the best CRM software options for small businesses? For small businesses looking for the best CRM software options in 2026, there are several excellent choices that balance affordability, ease of use, features, and scalability. Here are some of the top CRM solutions tailored for small business needs. HighLevel CRM (Best Overall for affordability, automation, and scalability) HubSpot CRM (Best free option for sales and marketing alignment) Less Annoying CRM (Best for basic features and startups) monday.com CRM (Best for task management and projects) Pipedrive (Best for sales management only) Zoho CRM (Best for affordablity) We are a HighLevel CRM agency. What is customer relationship management (CRM) software? CRM software is a centralized digital platform that helps businesses capture, organize, and manage customer data so nothing gets lost in email inboxes, spreadsheets, or sticky notes. It acts as a single source of truth for your contacts, leads, and clients, giving you clarity on every step of the customer journey. A good CRM lets you track your sales pipeline, log calls and emails, schedule meetings through calendar and booking tools, and automate follow-up with reminders, texts, and email workflows. Many systems also include lead scoring, marketing automation, and real-time reporting dashboards so you can see what’s working, what’s stalled, and where revenue is coming from. Most modern CRMs integrate with your website, forms, and marketing tools, creating a connected system that reduces manual work and improves consistency. In short, CRM software helps businesses communicate better, follow up smarter, and convert more opportunities into paying customers. What are the benefits of using CRM software for a small business? CRM software helps small businesses stay organized, respond faster, and grow more predictably by putting all customer information in one central system instead of scattered emails, notebooks, and spreadsheets. It gives you visibility into your contacts, leads, and clients so you always know who needs follow-up and what’s next. With a CRM, you can manage your sales pipeline, track deals, and see exactly where opportunities are getting stuck. Built-in automation handles routine tasks like follow-up emails, text reminders, and appointment booking, saving time while keeping communication consistent. Call logging, email tracking, and activity history make every interaction easy to find and review. Most CRMs also include lead scoring, marketing workflows, and reporting dashboards that help you spot patterns, prioritize the right prospects, and make better decisions based on real data. Because CRMs integrate with your website, forms, and marketing tools, your systems work together instead of creating extra busywork. For small businesses, the payoff is simple: fewer dropped leads, smoother operations, stronger relationships, and a clearer path to steady revenue. What CRM features are essential for a small business? For a small business, the goal of CRM is to keep customer information organized, speed up follow-up, and help you convert more leads without extra work. These core features are essential: • Contact & lead management – A central database for names, emails, phone numbers, notes, and interaction history so nothing is lost. • Sales pipeline / deal tracking – A visual pipeline that shows where each opportunity is (new lead, follow-up, proposal sent, won, or lost). • Activity tracking – Log calls, emails, meetings, and tasks so you can see every touchpoint with a contact. • Follow-up reminders & tasks – Automated alerts and to-dos that keep you from dropping the ball. • Email & communication tools – Built-in or integrated email and texting for faster outreach and templates that save time. • Automation & workflows – Rules that trigger actions like welcome emails, follow-up reminders, and lead routing without manual effort. • Calendar & appointment booking – Sync your schedule and let prospects book meetings without back-and-forth. • Reporting & dashboards – Visual insights into pipeline health, sales performance, and activity trends so you can make decisions with confidence. • Integrations – Connect your CRM to your website forms, marketing platforms, and other tools so data flows automatically. These features help small businesses stay organized, nurture leads consistently, streamline sales tasks, and understand performance with real facts instead of guesswork. Work Smarter Digital’s Revenue Accelerator is the proven CRM for small businesses. Streamline operations, eliminate manual bottlenecks, and automate growth with the only Small Business CRM software built specifically for your agency. These answers might help. What are the best CRM software options for small businesses? For small businesses looking for the best CRM software options in 2026, there are several excellent choices that balance affordability, ease of use, features, and scalability. Here are some of the top CRM solutions tailored for small business needs. HighLevel CRM (Best Overall for affordability, automation, and scalability) HubSpot CRM (Best free option for sales and marketing alignment) Less Annoying CRM (Best for basic features and startups) monday.com CRM (Best for task management and projects) Pipedrive (Best for sales management only) Zoho CRM (Best for affordablity) We are a HighLevel CRM agency. What is customer relationship management (CRM) software? CRM software is a centralized digital platform that helps businesses capture, organize, and manage customer data so nothing gets lost in email inboxes, spreadsheets, or sticky notes. It acts as a single source of truth for your contacts, leads, and clients, giving you clarity on every step of the customer journey. A good CRM lets you track your sales pipeline, log calls and emails, schedule meetings through calendar and booking tools, and automate follow-up with reminders, texts, and email workflows. Many systems also include lead scoring, marketing automation, and real-time reporting dashboards so you can see what’s working, what’s stalled, and where revenue is coming from. Most modern CRMs integrate with your website, forms, and marketing tools, creating a connected system that reduces manual work and improves consistency. In short, CRM software helps businesses communicate better, follow up smarter, and convert more opportunities into paying customers. What are the benefits of using CRM software for a small business? CRM software helps small businesses stay organized, respond faster, and grow more predictably by putting all customer information in one central system instead of scattered emails, notebooks, and spreadsheets. It gives you visibility into your contacts, leads, and clients so you always know who needs follow-up and what’s next. With a CRM, you can manage your sales pipeline, track deals, and see exactly where opportunities are getting stuck. Built-in automation handles routine tasks like follow-up emails, text reminders, and appointment booking, saving time while keeping communication consistent. Call logging, email tracking, and activity history make every interaction easy to find and review. Most CRMs also include lead scoring, marketing workflows, and reporting dashboards that help you spot patterns, prioritize the right prospects, and make better decisions based on real data. Because CRMs integrate with your website, forms, and marketing tools, your systems work together instead of creating extra busywork. For small businesses, the payoff is simple: fewer dropped leads, smoother operations, stronger relationships, and a clearer path to steady revenue. What CRM features are essential for a small business? For a small business, the goal of CRM is to keep customer information organized, speed up follow-up, and help you convert more leads without extra work. These core features are essential: • Contact & lead management – A central database for names, emails, phone numbers, notes, and interaction history so nothing is lost. • Sales pipeline / deal tracking – A visual pipeline that shows where each opportunity is (new lead, follow-up, proposal sent, won, or lost). • Activity tracking – Log calls, emails, meetings, and tasks so you can see every touchpoint with a contact. • Follow-up reminders & tasks – Automated alerts and to-dos that keep you from dropping the ball. • Email & communication tools – Built-in or integrated email and texting for faster outreach and templates that save time. • Automation & workflows – Rules that trigger actions like welcome emails, follow-up reminders, and lead routing without manual effort. • Calendar & appointment booking – Sync your schedule and let prospects book meetings without back-and-forth. • Reporting & dashboards – Visual insights into pipeline health, sales performance, and activity trends so you can make decisions with confidence. • Integrations – Connect your CRM to your website forms, marketing platforms, and other tools so data flows automatically. These features help small businesses stay organized, nurture leads consistently, streamline sales tasks, and understand performance with real facts instead of guesswork. Work Smarter Digital’s Revenue Accelerator is the proven CRM for small businesses. Streamline operations, eliminate manual bottlenecks, and automate growth with the only Small Business CRM software built specifically for your agency. The Digital Agency You've Been Looking For. Samantha Digital LLC is a leading digital marketing agency based in Fairfax, Virginia, serving clients worldwide. We help ambitious entrepreneurs get more website traffic, leads, & sales from their websites through strategic branding, web design, and search engine optimization. About Samantha Digital We specialize in branding, web design, and SEO for ambitious business owners that want to get more traffic from Google and more leads from their website. We pride ourselves on quality and integrity, so you can rest assured when you choose us as your digital marketing team, we will deliver. We are excited about the possibility of working with you, so get in touch with us today and we will get back to you to discuss how we can help grow your business. Our Core Beliefs No Business is Too Small for a Website Every business, regardless of its size, deserves a powerful online presence. We believe that even the smallest ventures with big ambitions can benefit immensely from a strategic website that acts as a cornerstone for growth and visibility. SEO is the #1 Form of Marketing, Even in 2025 *Especially* in 2025. In a digital world where competition is fierce, SEO remains the most effective marketing strategy. We prioritize search engine optimization because it provides sustainable, long-term traffic and growth, proving its value time and again. Your Website Should Work as Hard as You Do Your website shouldn't be just a digital business card. It should be a 24/7 marketing machine, constantly driving leads, sales, engagement, and building your brand. We ensure that your website is a dynamic asset, working around the clock to grow your business. We Believe in the Long Game True success isn't achieved through shortcuts or overnight tactics. We champion a long-term approach, focusing on strategies that build enduring value and robust growth for your business over time, rather than quick fixes. Samantha Digital History Wondering how we got started? It’s probably not what you think… 2019 Landed My ‘Dream’ Job In early 2019 I landed what I thought was my ‘dream’ job in consulting. I worked hard, stayed late, and kept learning. I loved solving clients’ complex problems and leading my team by example. However, after about a year, my passion for technology consulting fizzled out. 2019 2020 Turning Point I started a food blog, Lifestyled By Sam , as a creative outlet to share my passion for baking and hosting parties while leveraging my technical knowledge and experience. 2020 2021 Learning & Loving Blogging By the fall of 2021, I was starting to really feel like I was getting the hang of this whole blogging thing. I was noticing an uptick in traffic, and I was creating systems to be more effective. I continued to spend practically every minute outside of work on my food blog. Some of my most popular posts include: coffee gift basket , DIY mimosa bar , DIY edible arrangement , rainbow cupcake cake , Italian-themed date night , skeleton charcuterie board , and my margarita bar cart . 2021 2022 Founded Samantha Digital In 2022, I realized that while I loved blogging about desserts and hosting parties, my real passion was blogging, SEO, and website development. Therefore, I decided to put my food blog on hold and start Samantha Digital to help curious corporate employees, aspiring entrepreneurs, and growing small business get more traffic and leads from Google. (Yep, that’s our original logo!) 2022 2024 In The News Currently at Samantha Digital, we are focused on growing our portfolio, helping our clients, and staying up-to-date on the latest digital marketing trends. Walk away with a plan. We review your site, competitors, and search presence before the call. In 30 minutes you'll leave with three specific actions to move the needle — whether we work together or not. A real review, not a pitch. Three specific actions you can execute this week. An honest fit assessment. No pitch · No contract · Keep the plan — whether we work together or not. ★★★★★ 70+ client reviews 12 creative & SEO awards Serving 1,000+ businesses since 2012 This call is a fit if… Three types of businesses get the most value out of a 30-minute strategy call with Kevin. You're already investing and not seeing lift You want to finally understand your data You're scaling and need a growth engine What a working machine looks like. Three quick examples of what we've built for clients — the kind of work we can build for you. Gettysburg Museum of History — a tourist attraction with a marketing problem. 193% Revenue lift YoY $165K Additional annual revenue 9.2x Return on ad & SEO spend A historic destination with seasonal traffic and a small team. We rebuilt their SEO foundation, ran paid ads around trip-planning intent, and instrumented every conversion. Today they're the #1-ranked museum in Adams County for every query we targeted. See the case study → 79% Lower cost-per-lead for a local moving company 20 months of SEO + PPC. 47% lower cost-per-customer, 252% increase in operational capacity. They went from fighting for every lead to having a waiting list. 450% Increase in applicants for SCS Engineers Environmental engineering firm. Rebuilt career-path SEO and LinkedIn recruitment funnel — talent pipeline went from "nothing" to four-weeks-ahead. No mystery. Here's what the 30 minutes looks like. You fill out a 3-question intake, we prep, we talk, you leave with a plan. Before your call You'll fill out a 3-question intake so Kevin can prepare. He spends 30–45 minutes reviewing your site, top 3 competitors, and Google search presence before you get on. On the call (30 minutes) No deck. No pitch. Kevin walks you through what he found: where you're strong, where you're leaking revenue, and exactly what to do about it. You talk. He listens. After You leave with three specific actions. Follow up with your team — or with us. Either way, the plan is yours to keep. Ready to Be Cert AI n? Stop guessing. Start growing. Book My Free Session What You’ll Get? Every executive and business owner that struggles with uncertainty over the future of AI and business development. We build the machine that makes AI actually work for your business. “Isn’t SEO already dead and SEM is dying?” Buyers still search. AI still pulls from the same sources as Google. You just need to rank for both. That’s what we build. Move forward with clarity while others hesitate with uncertainty. Let's Grow Ready to Be Cert AI n? Stop guessing. Start growing. Book My Free Session What You’ll Get? A strategy and actions to increase inbound leads and sales. Every executive and business owner that struggles with uncertainty over the future of AI and business development. About TESSA TESSA is a full-service digital marketing agency that builds AI-powered marketing systems for business owners, professional services firms, home service businesses, municipal governments, Fortune 1000, and growth-stage companies. TESSA’s services include Search Engine Optimization (SEO), paid search advertising (Google Ads, Microsoft Ads), paid social media advertising (Meta, LinkedIn), website design and development, AI-powered websites featuring RAG-based intelligent site search, interactive AI avatars, and AI chatbots for automated lead generation, and WCAG 2.2 AA web accessibility compliance. TESSA specializes in building replicable marketing systems that deliver consistent lead generation, predictable revenue growth, and measurable return on marketing investment. TESSA has served over a thousand businesses across the United States since 2012. TESSA offers a free 30-minute digital marketing strategy session for business owners seeking consistent leads and scalable revenue growth. 30 minutes. No pitch. Leave with a clear plan to increase revenue. pages.about: Digital Marketing Agency MD DC VA | RevvPartners Inc Privacy Policy Home Services Strategy First Web Design & Development Inbound Marketing Content Marketing Search Engine Optimization Social Media Marketing Paid Search Lead Generation Email Marketing Marketing Automation & CRM Tools Web Analytics About Resources Free Resources Blog Contact Schedule a Call About Revv Partners   We help businesses navigate the complex and ever-changing digital marketplace. Revv Partners is made up of assorted experts in marketing, advertising, technology, creative development, project management and more . And we utilize our skills, talents and resources as needed to help clients attain their marketing objectives and goals.  So, we’re flexible, and somewhat unique. We can provide expertise and help where and when you need it . We can plan and execute a complete marketing program, or complement your existing staff and/or resources. OR we can work with your existing agency – or web developer – and fill in the gaps. Or start from scratch and manage the whole marketing program. WE’RE COMMITTED TO HELPING SMALL AND MEDIUM BUSINESSES (SMBS) GROW THEIR BUSINESS. Digital marketing can be overwhelming. We can help you sort through the myriad of strategies, tactics, tools, services and technology. We are experienced marketers who get to know your business, and develop and implement strategies & tactics customized to your unique situation.  We work with you and your marketing team, and strive to re-tool your existing marketing efforts into an efficient, effective and profitable online lead-gen system and process. We invite you to take advantage of our experience, skills and expertise. Together we can help you grow your business. Let’s get started. Let's get started. Request a complimentary assessment. pages.home: Digital Marketing Agency | Marketing Strategist | Revv Partners Privacy Policy Home Services Strategy First Web Design & Development Inbound Marketing Content Marketing Search Engine Optimization Social Media Marketing Paid Search Lead Generation Email Marketing Marketing Automation & CRM Tools Web Analytics About Resources Free Resources Blog Contact Schedule a Call We Help Businesses Grow WITH STRATEGIC MARKETING AND SALES SOLUTIONS Revv Partners helps businesses create and execute strategic marketing efforts that align with their overarching business objectives.  Ready for your digital marketing to bring you more ideal clients? Digital Marketing Solutions Tailored for Professional Services and Non-Profits. Marketing as a small business is a daunting task.  Even if you had the expertise, navigating the constant evolution of digital strategies requires time and energy you likely don't have. At Revv Partners, we alleviate these pressures by providing comprehensive, results-driven marketing solutions tailored to meet your unique business needs, allowing you to focus on what you do best—running your business. Strategy before tactics! At Revv Partners, we champion a 'Strategy First' philosophy, ensuring that every aspect of your marketing—from web development to SEO and paid search—is smartly aligned with your overarching business objectives. Before deploying any tactics, we build a strategic foundation to maximize ROI and effectiveness, turning your marketing efforts from sporadic to strategic . Our team aims to play a strategic role in our client's business, providing leadership in marketing - implementing and guiding the execution plan. Customized services to help you get found, generate leads and close business. Web Development Is your website an online brochure or a lead generation tool? Our Growth Driven Design approach can improve the return on your website investment. Inbound Marketing Content? SEO? Social? Paid Search? Email? Which strategies work best for your unique situation? Our tools, services and support can "revv" your return. Lead Generation Syncing your marketing and sales efforts provides synergy and increased productivity. Book more meetings & close more deals with a lot less work. Tracking & Analytics You can't manage what you don't measure. Our tracking and analytics services provide insight and help improve ROI on your marketing investment. See our wide range of service offerings here Bottom Line... WE BUILD MARKETING PROGRAMS THAT GET RESULTS Revv Partners is made up of assorted experts in marketing, advertising, technology, creative development, project management, web analytics and more. We apply our skills, talents and resources as needed to help our clients attain their marketing objectives and goals.  If you’re feeling overwhelmed with the myriad of digital marketing strategies and tactics, or lack the knowledge, skills and/or time to manage your online marketing efforts, Revv Partners can help. To get started, request a complimentary Marketing Assessment and Consultation with a Revv Strategist.    If your marketing efforts aren't delivering the results you want and you're too busy running your business to put in the extra time and energy, it's time to explore a new strategy. pages.about: About Us | Alexandria VA Web Design and Internet Marketing Agency (571) 604-5474 info@herbstmarketing.com HOME CONTACT About Services Websites Google Business Profile Optimization Search Engine Optimization (SEO) Reputation Management Marketing Automation and Sales Funnels Social Media Marketing Printing Services FUN CALCULATORS Double Revenue With Herbst Marketing Calculator Calculate Customer Value: Herbst Marketing Guide Blog Select Page About Us Herbst Marketing helps small business owners leverage the internet to: generate more leads, attract and keep more customers, make more sales and increase profits. In today’s world, doing business without a website is like doing business without a telephone. To be effective, small business websites need to be designed and structured in a specific way to “get the click and get the sale.” While there are plenty of free do-it-yourself website options available to small business owners today, few small business owners have the know-how or the time to design and set up a website that works — a website that will actually help you grow your business and save you money, time and energy on marketing and advertising. The Herbst Marketing team of web design and internet marketing specialists can create the web presence you need to compete effectively in today’s economy. Our expertise encompasses: Small Business Website Design and Development Local Search Optimization: Google Places and Local Directory Listings Social Media Services: Facebook, Linked-In, Twitter Profile Set-Up Blog Content Development and Management Web Copywriting Reputation Management and Online Reviews Management If you need professional help creating and managing a web presence that will grow your business and revenue Call Herbst Marketing 540-937-7234 to schedule your web marketing consultation. Herbst Marketing Services is owned by Yvonne Herbst, who along with her small team of dedicated website development professionals, provides small business website design, web copywriting services, web video production, social media management (i.e. facebook, twitter, google+, etc.) and internet marketing services (i.e. website optimization and promotion) to local business owners. Call Yvonne directly for advice: (540) 937-7234. pages.home: Website Design and Internet Marketing Service Virginia (571) 604-5474 info@herbstmarketing.com HOME CONTACT About Services Websites Google Business Profile Optimization Search Engine Optimization (SEO) Reputation Management Marketing Automation and Sales Funnels Social Media Marketing Printing Services FUN CALCULATORS Double Revenue With Herbst Marketing Calculator Calculate Customer Value: Herbst Marketing Guide Blog Select Page Business Growth Solutions for Home Service Businesses NOW BOOKING: MAY MAILING - ALEXANDRIA BUSINESS SPOTLIGHT - RESERVE YOUR SPACE TODAY Herbst Marketing helps home service businesses grow sales and revenues using cutting-edge digital marketing campaigns, tools and strategies. How We Work   Every home service business has its own unique challenges and growth objectives. That’s why we work hand-in-hand with each of our clients to develop customized marketing strategies and campaigns designed to cost-effectively and efficiently achieve their growth objectives. Whatever your digital marketing needs, we can help: with high-converting website and landing page designs, SEO services that position you as the top choice in online searches for your services, marketing automations that enhance business operations and efficiency, Google and Facebook ad campaigns that create a predictable flow of jobs booked direct into your calendar, or social media marketing that keeps you top of mind in your ideal target customer. We only work with companies that we are confident we can help. Book a call today to discuss how we can serve as your go-to business growth partner. BOOK A FREE STRATEGY CALL NOW Businesses We Help Cleaning HVAC home improvement INTERIOR DESIGN Junk Removal Landscaping Moving painting Plumbing Roofing trees Windows / Siding book a call Discover How Our Compound Growth Marketing System Will Help Your Company Attract More High-Value High-Ticket Customers Generate More Repeat Business and Recurring Income Tap the Hidden Goldmine in Your Existing Customer Database BOOK A FREE STRATEGY CALL NOW HOW WE HELP YOU GROW YOUR BUSINESS Get Found by Local Customers   Be found where it matters most—right in your community. Local SEO ensures your business shows up at the top when nearby customers search, driving more calls, visits, and sales from people ready to buy. Claim Your Spot Turn Google Into a Sales Machine   Transform your Google Business Profile into a 24/7 lead generator. A fully optimized listing boosts visibility in Maps and Search, attracts clicks, and converts browsers into loyal customers. Optimize My Profile Leads On Demand   Get qualified leads delivered right when you need them. Tap the hidden goldmine in your customer list with email marketing. Add data-driven optimized ad campaigns that put your business in front of the right people at the right time—maximizing every ad dollar for predictable, scalable growth. Start Generating Leads Build Trust With 5-Star Reviews   Your reviews are your reputation. More 5-star Google reviews mean instant trust, greater credibility, and a powerful edge over competitors—because customers always choose the business they trust first. Boost My Reputation Never Miss Another Lead   Save time and close more deals with smart automation. Book a demo call today to learn how our marketing automation can improve your company’s efficiency and profitability. Automate My Marketing “MY WEBSITE IS ATTRACTING THE VERY TYPE OF CLIENT THAT I WANT” I’m number two for “expert kitchen designer” in some very very competitive markets … and the type of people that my website is attracting is the very type of client that I want. A couple of months ago, the website generated an ideal lead for me. They were already pre-sold on me as a result of reading through my website. And they said the reason they wanted me was because by reading the website they knew I was “just the person they were looking for!” You get a lot of people trying to sell pay per click services to you and this is just a much more organic and authentic way to go about it. Yvonne taught me how to expand my overall web presence and sphere of influence online. Sandra Brannock Owner , Expert Kitchen Designs, Amissville, Virginia “HIGHLY RECOMMEND YVONNE TO ANYONE WHO HAS ISSUES WITH GOOGLE” I highly recommend Herbst Marketing, and Yvonne in particular, to anyone that needs a good seo , website design or have any issues with Google. Yvonne did an amazing job getting my locksmith company listing back on Google. She is very knowledgeable, professional and easy to deal with in those stressful times. She also did some improvements to my existing website that contribute to my ranking on Google. Thank you again Yvonne !! Netanel Rosenzvig Locksmith , BZB Lock & Key, Anaheim, CA YVONNE HAS BEEN A PRICELESS RESOURCE Marketing our medical services has become so simple and successful since we began working with Yvonne. From the start she listened to our goals and vision and formulated the perfect plan for us. From redesigning our website to creating our strategic marketing plan, Yvonne has been a priceless resource. I wish we had found her 5 years ago! Dr. David Stewart, M.D. President , Loudoun Holistic Health Partners, PLLC, Leesburg VA “RECEIVED 171 LEADS & 40 NEW PEOPLE FROM OUR FACEBOOK CAMPAIGN” We got a lot of brand new students into our yoga studio at a time when yoga studios typically experience a dropoff in membership during the summer. On Wednesday we broke our all-time record for the number of people coming into our studio, so the ad compaign is definitely generating new business for us. During a 2-week period we had 40 people come into our studio and sign up for classes — and that is 40 people who never would have come in beforehand. Creative Work Just one more level Game Development We love games and we know you do too. It doesn’t matter if it’s for web, mobile, AR, VR or Roblox, whether it’s a game just for fun or an educational game infused with your learning objectives we’ll have your audience squealing with glee as they play and engage with your brand and/or curriculum. Game Development Work The web never looked so good Interactive Web Development Our web developers craft unique and delightful websites that captivate users with engaging interactions and animations. From robust backend systems to responsive, visually stunning interfaces and animations, we ensure your web product shines on every platform. Web Development Work Make it hap'n cap'n Product Development Got a cool product you need help launching? Our team of creatives and full-stack developers can make it happen faster than you think! We’ll take care of everything from your marketing website to the application itself and all backend services. We create apps that reach your users wherever they are—iOS, Android, and the web. Product Development Work Movin' and groovin' Animation Our animation team can take on any project and make it dance! Whether it’s crafting a full animated series, bringing sprite animation to life for mobile or web games, or making your product shine with an engaging explainer video, we infuse every frame with energy and life. Let's animate your vision into something unforgettable! Animation Work We make fun stuff... We make fun stuff... Fresh out of the oven Our newest work Discover Our newest work Phoebe & Jay Apps & Game Development Count On Junebug Apps & Game Development Pokémon Pokopia Website Web Development Rosie's Rules Apps & Game Development City Island Apps & Game Development Lyla In The Loop Apps & Game Development Sesame Street Apps & Game Development Disney Junior: Ready for Preschool Apps & Game Development Discover our newest work How we do it Step 1 Concepting Step 2 Wireframe Step 3 Prototype Step 4 Art/Design Step 5 Development Step 6 QA Step 7 Launch Step 8 Maintenance Think of us as your creative partners. We dive into your vision with you, turning big ideas into tangible results. From the first brainstorm to launch day and beyond, we navigate each stage with you, ensuring that your project is exceptional and ready to shine. About us We like ships. As in... re-lat-ion-ships Our Friends High five! Awards Tooting our own horn here! We’re proud to say that over the years our work has earned many top industry honors. What’s even better are the friends we’ve made along the way. Let's be friends Want to work with us? Contact Us P: 208.461.5551 1228 1st Street South, Nampa, ID 83651 Follow us on Mr. Alligator That's what I'm talkin' bout' Willis! Privacy Policy | Cookie Settings
pages.careers: Careers | Curious Media Contact Us Home About Work Careers Contact Careers Have skills to pay the bills? Talent Hunting We’re always on the look out for new talent and skilled individuals. Send us your resume and portfolio to: jobs@curiousmedia.com What to expect Good times Fun, of course! At Curious Media, we believe work should be a delightful adventure filled with laughter and creativity. Our team enjoys a playful atmosphere where innovative ideas flourish and every day brings a new and exciting challenge. Super professional Responsibility & Independence We trust our team members to take ownership of their projects, providing them with the freedom to innovate and make impactful decisions. Here, you’ll find the perfect balance of autonomy and support, empowering you to excel and grow. High five! Collaboration At Curious Media we foster a team-oriented culture where diverse ideas come together to create extraordinary results, encouraging open communication and mutual respect. Let's be friends Want to work with us? Contact Us P: 208.461.5551 1228 1st Street South, Nampa, ID 83651 Follow us on Mr. Alligator That's what I'm talkin' bout' Willis! pages.about: Brandefined 888-406-9774 Home (current) About Us Our Work Press Blog Contact Us Login Register --> × Home About Us Press Our Work Gallery Graphics Website Design Content Management Search Engine Optimization Brand Management --> Social Media SEM Remarketing Appointment Setters --> Local SEO Blog Contact Us Privacy Policy Terms Of Service ☰ × About Us Big Brand Strategies for Small Business OUR PHILOSOPHY Education and consultation over selling... Too often advertising agencies focus on selling products regardless of benefit. Modern digital marketing and brand management is far too complicated for a “one size fits all” approach. Nuances and subtle differences separate you from your competition and a custom strategy tailored to your business is essential for long term success. OUR MISSION Whether you’re new to brand management or a seasoned business owner looking to partner with an agency, our mission is to meet you where you’re at and grow with you. As a creative agency and brand management firm, we are more than just a marketing company. We have the resources and experience to match your pace and budget as we take on the digital marketing landscape together. OUR HISTORY Founded in 2011 by industry veterans, Brandefined has been, and proudly remains, a work in progress. During the rise of high-speed internet in the early 2000’s, our Founders were helping businesses adapt by establishing their online presence. In those early years of digital marketing, a comprehensive online strategy simply involved a quality website and first page visibility on the search engines. By comparison to the current technological landscape, those times were simple. If Brandefined was to continue providing effective solutions to our clients, we had to adapt. The decade that followed saw mobile devices largely replace personal computers and the unprecedented rise of social media. By necessity, once effective online strategies had to be completely reimagined. And, with each advancement, our team responded by developing new products and solutions to help local businesses thrive. Ranging from responsive web development to comprehensive social media management, we have built the infrastructure to adapt to the changing digital landscape. We are wholly committed to working on behalf of our clients by providing effective, affordable solutions that meet today’s needs while continuing to evolve toward the future. 15220 NW Greenbrier Pkwy STE 235 Beaverton, OR 97006 (888) 406-9774 Navigation Home About Us Press Our Work Gallery Graphics Website Design Content Management Search Engine Optimization Brand Management --> Social Media SEM Remarketing Appointment Setters --> Local SEO Blog Contact Us Terms Of Service Privacy Policy Login --> © 2026 Copyright Brandefined | Designed by Brandefined

Graphic Design From the digital to the tangible, we design it all. For five consecutive years, Brandefined has ranked among the top creative agencies in the Pacific Northwest. Careers Client Portal Client Support Ticket Our Story Our Story Learn more about BoBella Brands and what sets us apart from the rest Our Mission We help our clients build brand awareness, establish a positive brand reputation, and increase customer engagement. ENTREPRENEURSHIP We help you accomplish your entrepreneurial dreams by taking your vision and turning it into reality. Let us focus on building your brand, so you can concentrate on what you do best. PARTNERSHIP Our highly skilled staff will work directly with your team to execute a marketing plan that delivers. We work with you every step of the way so you won’t have to figure it out all by yourself. GROWTH You want to find, keep, and grow your dream customers. Through data-driven strategies, creative design, and expert marketing campaigns, we work with you to grow your brand. Our Story In 2014, Jennifer Holm decided that excellent marketing should be accessible to everyone, not just companies with massive marketing budgets. She founded BoBella to make this idea a reality. BoBella is a woman-owned boutique marketing company based in Bethesda, Maryland. We take pride in our entrepreneurial spirit and dedication to fostering long-term partnerships. Our experienced team specializes in brand strategy, digital marketing, web design, and outreach promotions. Our focus is on delivering innovative solutions that drive growth and boost sales. With a commitment to seamless project delivery, we give you the freedom to focus on running your business while we handle all of your marketing needs. Why BoBella? Our name is inspired by beauty and balance. “Bo” stems from beau , the masculine word for beautiful in French, while “Bella” is the feminine word for beautiful in Italian. Together, they form BoBella, symbolizing our dedication to creating beautiful and impactful brands. Today, the BoBella team proudly serves businesses all over the world. Book A Call Now Clients 0 + Coding Hours 0 + Client Satisfaction 0 % Projects Completed 0 + Our awesome team Jennifer Holm Founder / Strategy Linkedin Envelope Alamin Musa Account Manager Linkedin Envelope Alamin Musa Web Design Linkedin Envelope Alamin Musa Graphic Design Linkedin Envelope Alamin Musa Digital Marketing Linkedin Envelope Book A Call Now Our Team We are comprised of brilliant Marketing Strategists, Creative Gurus, and Growth Hackers.  If you want a passionate and dedicated team to help with marketing your brand, contact us today!  The team at BoBella is comprised of dynamic and experienced marketing experts. We pay a great deal of attention to details and understand how to get your message to the right people. We provide our clients with technical creativity and uniquely tailored strategies coupled with a team of highly effective marketers to see their vision through. Whether we’re working with local small businesses on their digital marketing strategy or government organizations on community outreach, we strive to constantly cultivate fresh ideas and bring unique solutions to challenging problems. We partner with organizations of all sizes nationwide and tailor creative strategies that compliment your existing marketing efforts. Book A Call Now Web Designers & Developers HTML, CSS, & Javascript 100% WordPress 95% Shopify 80% Squarespace 60% Branding & Design Adobe Creative Suite 95% Brand Strategy & Marketing Theories 90% Motion Graphics & Animation 82% Consumer Psychology & Color Theory 75% Digital Marketing AMA Digital PCM Certification 95% Google Certified 90% SEO Experts 80% Facebook Certified 70% Frequently asked questions What makes BoBella stand out? We believe that top-notch marketing should be affordable for all businesses. We are different from other agencies because everything we do is built around generating leads long-term. We believe that you should own your marketing systems and the leads it generates. We will build those systems for you, ensuring that you have ownership of all the data. The team at BoBella knows how to create design that is built with digital analytics in mind. This leads to marketing that is trackable, you can see exactly how we are preforming from our detailed monthly reports. How much does a website cost? Our website design process is 100% customized to meet your budget and goals. Our custom built website strategy packages starts as low as $5,000.  We have clients who are even on a 12-month engagement to help stay on budget. To start working with us, it is best to set up a call. We can have a conversation about the functionalities you will need and the complexity of your organization. We usually build on WordPress, so the back-end of the website is easy to use for non-technical people.  Our goal is to build a rock-solid website that generates you leads for lasting, long-term success. How much does Digital Marketing Cost? Our digital marketing services start at $575 a month with a 3-month minimum commitment. Depending on what your needs are (PPC Ads, SEO, Social Media, Lead Generation, etc.) we can strategize the components of your project and build out a monthly ongoing plan. Our goal is to bring you conversions. We will work together to determine what those conversions will be, ie: sales, leads, views, likes, etc., and ensure that we meet our set KPIs each month. What's included in your monthly reports? We customize our digital marketing reports to focus on the analytics that are important to you and your business. There are no cookie-cutter solutions for our clients. We customize every program and report to your specific needs. We recommend scheduling monthly chats to review the your marketing reports. On these video call will will go over all of the key details of your account, review what’s working, and ensure that we are in agreement for our goals are each month. This allows us to pivot as needed on a month-to-month basis allowing your business to adapt quickly to changes in your industry. How long will it take to start seeing results? Any digital marketing strategy is going to take time to get results. That is why we recommend a minimum commitment of 3 months for any of our digital marketing packages. After 3 months, you should start seeing a return on your investment, and after 6-9 months there should be upward traffic and more leads that will attribute to growth. At BoBella our goal is to help you build brand awareness, establish a positive reputation, and increase customer engagement. We create customized branding solutions and targeted marketing campaigns for businesses and organizations of all sizes.
